description:
Bottom part of a Legal document, on vellum, only the signature of Avraham ha-Levi b. Ḥāriṯ Zeqan ha-Qehillot is preserved. This Avraham is known from other documents, such as TS 10 J 28.9 (1130-1138; published by Friedman, Polygyny, pp. 88-91). 
AA
description_he: תחתית מסמך משפטי על קלף; נשמרת רק חתימת אברהם הלוי בן חארית' זקן הקהילות
